scope.target: Public REL-v0.4.2 GitHub Release body correction and R042-005 closure
constraints: Require explicit authorization before external mutation
Replace only the Release body from corrected authored sources
Do not move the tag or alter the four published assets
Read back and verify hosted state before claiming closure
non_goals: Change release title, draft state, prerelease state, or tag

steps: Render the body from corrected v0.4.2 authored sources and immutable commit
Replace the public GitHub Release body
Read back the hosted release and verify body, state, tag, and asset count
Finalize R042-005, roadmap current target, workflow report, and closure commit
validation: rendered body matches the corrected local source and contains the final published SHA
tag v0.4.2 and release ID remain unchanged
final repository validators and workflow commit range pass
execution.last_completed_step: Read-back verified the corrected hosted body, stable release state, unchanged tag, and all four original asset digests.
execution.next_action: None; R042-005 is closed and v0.5.0 planning may begin.

results.summary: Used the authenticated gh CLI after explicit authorization to replace only the REL-v0.4.2 body with the repository-rendered source, then read it back and verified exact body equality without changing tag, title, release state, or assets.
tests_run: pre-change gh release view: invalid SHA count 1 and asset count 4
post-change gh release view: exact rendered-body match, automation marker count 1, provenance heading count 1, migration heading count 1, invalid SHA count 0
post-change release invariants: tag v0.4.2, title REL-v0.4.2, non-draft, non-prerelease, asset count 4, all asset digests unchanged
Git for Windows Bash .ai/scripts/check-all.sh --quick: 21/21 required checks passed with zero failures
results.residual_risk: The current hotfix is not part of the immutable v0.4.2 tree; REL-001 and HANDOFF-001 remain required v0.5.0 prevention work.
